subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The application of this Section is subject to the following:

ol.li: The Governing Requirements of NCC Volume Two.
The State and Territory variations, additions and deletions contained in the Schedules to the ABCB Housing Provisions and NCC Volume Two.

callout.p: In NCC 2019, the content of Section 11 of the ABCB Housing Provisions (other than content added in NCC 2022 or later) was contained in the acceptable construction practices for Parts 3.9.1 and 3.9.2 of NCC 2019 Volume Two.
